subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Strive thou, that thou mayest attain unto the fruit of the Tree of the Most Exalted Pen. Whoso hath attained thereunto, no harm shall befall him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد جهد نما تا بثمره شجره قلم اعلی فائز شوی هر نفسی بان فائز شد لا یضره
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
